violations.text: Residential pesticide observed in basement area. PIC informed to cease use and remove from the premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the basement prep area and at the 3 bay faucet. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the prep room and in storage room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Food prep sink in basement is equipped with an air break. Air gap is required; state guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The floors in the basement prep area were observed in poor repair (chipped painted cement). The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
